nasb.text: Now these are the names of those who were born to him in Jerusalem: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon,

esv.text: And these are the names of those who were born to him in Jerusalem: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon,

cnv.text: 以下這些就是他在耶路撒冷所生的孩子的名字：沙母亞、朔罷、拿單、所羅門、

ccb.text: 以下是他在耶路撒冷生的儿子：沙姆亚、朔罢、拿单、所罗门、
